title: Better Progression
description: Minecraft early progression is effortless and boring. Let's change that.
body:
# Better Progression

The goal of this mod is to make Minecraft progression more challenging, engaging and rewarding by replacing wood, stone and iron gear with flint, brass, and cast iron.

## Feature list
- Removed **Wooden**, **Stone**, **Iron** tools
- Removed **Iron** armor
- Added **Flint**, **Brass**, **Cast Iron** tools
- Added **Brass** and **Cast Iron** armor
- Compatible with [Create Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric 'Create Fabric'), [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat 'Better Combat') and [Alloy Forgery](https://modrinth.com/mod/alloy-forgery 'Alloy Forgery') *(I recommend to play with these mods)*

## Missing features
- Advancements adjustments

## Feature request
If you have an idea that you think would fit this mod please feel free to submit a feature request on [GitHub](https://github.com/8lendzior/better-progression/issues/new?assignees=&labels=&projects=&template=feature_request.md&title=)
